case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. MIQUEL ANGEL SANCHEZ GANCEDA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ GANCEDA, MIQUEL ANGEL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,650.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ GANCEDA, MIQUEL ANGEL
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT (PROOF OF SERVICE ATTACHED: MAILING DATE: 12/29/15), $100.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ GANCEDA, MIQUEL ANGEL
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ GANCEDA, MIQUEL ANGEL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-14-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DIANA PERDOMO--SENIOR COLLECTION SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MARITZA ZURITA. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,148.51 AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ GANCEDA, MIQUEL ANGEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $100.00 - SERVED FEB-21-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ GANCEDA, MIQUEL ANGEL

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.
